techniques.evidence_quote: The adversary achieved command shell level access to the cloud-hosted server through exploitation of an externally facing web application.
The observed execution occurred on the host under a Windows command shell

techniques.technique_name: Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API
techniques.evidence_quote: The adversary queried cloud instance metadata, showing interest in a particular IAM role.
executed a customer compiled version of the Chisel protocol tunneling tool to establish a reverse tunnel
use of Chisel to attempt protocol tunneling using an external SOCKS proxy
attempted to connect to various endpoints across ports indicating interest in SSH, RDP, SQLServer and MySQL services

attack_chain.description: Adversary exploited an externally facing web application on a cloud-hosted Windows server to achieve command shell level access.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The adversary achieved command shell level access to the cloud-hosted server through exploitation of an externally facing web application.

evidence_chunks.quote: The adversary achieved command shell level access to the cloud-hosted server through exploitation of an externally facing web application.
The adversary achieved command shell level access to the cloud-hosted server through exploitation of an externally facing web application.

attack_chain.description: Execution occurred on the host under a Windows command shell.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The observed execution occurred on the host under a Windows command shell

evidence_chunks.quote: The observed execution occurred on the host under a Windows command shell
The observed execution occurred on the host under a Windows command shell

attack_chain.description: Adversary performed discovery, collecting information on network connections, running processes and system users.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: collecting information on network connections, running processes and system users

evidence_chunks.quote: collecting information on network connections, running processes and system users
collecting information on network connections, running processes and system users

attack_chain.technique_name: Unsecured Credentials: Cloud Instance Metadata API
attack_chain.description: Adversary queried the cloud instance metadata service (IMDS) via PowerShell, targeting a particular IAM role to harvest credentials.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: The adversary queried cloud instance metadata, showing interest in a particular IAM role. The use of PowerShell to query the API is seen less frequently than the use of curl.

evidence_chunks.quote: The adversary queried cloud instance metadata, showing interest in a particular IAM role. The use of PowerShell to query the API is seen less frequently than the use of curl.
The adversary queried cloud instance metadata, showing interest in a particular IAM role. The use of PowerShell to query the API is seen less frequently than the use of curl.

attack_chain.description: Adversary executed a custom-compiled Chisel tool to establish a reverse protocol tunnel to adversary infrastructure, using an external SOCKS proxy.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: executed a customer compiled version of the Chisel protocol tunneling tool to establish a reverse tunnel between the endpoint and adversary infrastructure

evidence_chunks.quote: executed a customer compiled version of the Chisel protocol tunneling tool to establish a reverse tunnel between the endpoint and adversary infrastructure
executed a customer compiled version of the Chisel protocol tunneling tool to establish a reverse tunnel between the endpoint and adversary infrastructure

attack_chain.description: Via the Chisel tunnel, the adversary attempted lateral movement, probing endpoints on SSH, RDP, SQLServer, and MySQL ports.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Utilizing the established Chisel tunnel, the adversary attempted to connect to various endpoints across ports indicating interest in SSH, RDP, SQLServer and MySQL services.

evidence_chunks.quote: Utilizing the established Chisel tunnel, the adversary attempted to connect to various endpoints across ports indicating interest in SSH, RDP, SQLServer and MySQL services.
Utilizing the established Chisel tunnel, the adversary attempted to connect to various endpoints across ports indicating interest in SSH, RDP, SQLServer and MySQL services.

impact_type: Account Takeover (attempted credential theft and lateral movement)
initial_access_vector: Exploitation of an externally facing web application on a cloud-hosted Windows server.
persistence_mechanism: Not described for this incident (Chisel reverse tunnel provided ongoing C2 access).
privilege_escalation: Attempted via harvesting of cloud instance credentials/IAM role from IMDS (not confirmed successful).
